content.summaryText: Obesity Assessment and Staging is part of Metabolic Syndrome and Obesity in the theme Nutrition and Metabolic Health. This module focuses on: Use BMI and waist measures.

content.questionText: Which action best supports this course objective: Use BMI and waist measures?
content.explanation: The best answer is the action that directly helps learners apply 'Use BMI and waist measures' while studying Obesity Assessment and Staging.

options.text: Use a structured checklist and verify outcomes
Skip baseline assessment to save time
Rely only on memory without documentation

content.summaryText: Practical emphasis: Detect obesity complications. Learners should practice concise decision-making and escalation when necessary.

content.questionText: A clear plan for 'Detect obesity complications' improves consistency in Obesity Assessment and Staging.
content.explanation: Structured plans reduce omissions and improve safe, repeatable care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
